svg.text: Figure 1 · Angular Luminance Uniformity Across Cinema Display Technologies
Normalized luminance L(θ)/L₀ measured at 15 m viewing distance · Photo Research PR-745 spectroradiometer · n = 18 positions × 3 repetitions
Viewing Angle θ ( degrees off-axis, horizontal plane )
SPECTRA retains >85% of on-axis luminance at 85° off-axis (CV = 1.8% across 178°).
Projection systems fall below 50% by 30-45° (CV = 22-41%). This enables 98.4% sweet spot coverage vs 18-24% for premium projection.
